app.name: PloppyTV
search.noResultsAlt: No results for "{query}". Similar results for "{alt}":
search.rateLimit: Too many searches. Wait a few seconds.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome.title: Welcome to PloppyTV!
dashboard.welcome.text: You haven't added any shows yet. Use the search bar above to find your favorite TV shows.
dashboard.randomGold.desc: A random 5★ episode from your library
dashboard.randomGold.empty: No 5★ rated episodes yet. Rate your favorites with 5 stars!
detail.noEpisodes.desc: This show has no registered episodes.
notes.title: Episode note
notes.placeholder: Write a private note for this episode... (max {max} characters)
tags.title: Add tag to "{name}"
library.title: Library
library.empty.desc: You have no shows in this list.
library.noMatch: No shows match the selected filters
stats.title: Statistics
stats.noData.desc: Add TV shows to view statistics.
stats.error.title: Loading error
stats.noDataGenre: No data. Mark some episodes as watched.
yearReview.title: Your {year} in TV
yearReview.noData: No data for {year}. Watch some shows and come back at year's end!
calendar.title: Calendar
discover.title: Discover
notifications.title: Episode notifications
toast.ratingError: Rating not saved (storage error or changes in another tab)
toast.noteError: Note not saved (storage error or changes in another tab)
toast.tagError: Tag not saved (storage error or changes in another tab)
toast.tagRemoveError: Tag removal not saved (storage error or changes in another tab)
toast.notSaved: Change not saved (storage error or changes in another tab)
toast.removeError: Cannot remove (storage error or changes in another tab)
toast.moveError: Move not saved (changes in another tab?)
toast.newVersion: New version available — tap to update
toast.corruptedManual: Corrupted data. Use Import to restore.
toast.quotaWarn: Warning: data near limit ({size}KB). Use Export for backup.
toast.quotaFull: Out of space. Export backup and remove old shows.
toast.multiTabConflict: Changes in another tab — reload to see updated data
toast.multiTabDeleted: Data deleted in another tab — reload to sync
toast.multiTabUpdate: Update from another tab — reload to sync
toast.chunkError: Module load error — reload the page
toast.renderError.desc: Reload the page to retry. If the problem persists, clear your browser cache.
modal.privateMode.title: Private browsing mode
modal.privateMode.body1: Your browser doesn't allow local storage (private mode or storage disabled).
modal.privateMode.body2: You can use PloppyTV, but all data will be lost on reload.
modal.privateMode.body3: For persistence, disable private mode or enable cookies/storage in settings.
modal.remove.title: Remove "{name}"?
modal.remove.body: The show will be removed from your list. This action cannot be undone.
modal.about.title: About PloppyTV
